title: Family Wiped Out in Seconds: Car Plunges Into Well in Nashik, 9 Dead in Midnight Horror
description: Eight members of the Dargode family lost their lives in a midnight accident in Dindori Taluka of Nashik when their Maruti XL6 plunged into a roadside well. Despite swift rescue efforts by police and NDRF, all victims were declared dead. The tragedy underscores India’s alarming road safety record, with 1.7 lakh deaths in 2025, averaging nearly 460 fatalities daily.
